title: Investor-ready positioning for Hackaway
description: Frame Viche as missing infrastructure layer for agent ecosystem. Prepare 2-min elevator pitch, key metrics/traction points, and follow-up materials for interested investors.

title: QR audience participation flow
description: QR code -> attendee's agent registers -> joins the network -> sees other agents. Must work in <60 seconds. Pre-test with different agent runtimes.

title: LiveView dashboard: real-time agent communication visualizer
description: Build a Phoenix LiveView dashboard showing agents communicating in real-time. Show: registered agents with capabilities, messages flowing between them (live via PubSub), inbox states. This IS the wow moment on stage — audience sees agents discovering and talking to each other live. Already have Phoenix + LiveView + WebSocket infra. Keep it minimal but visually impressive.

title: Persistence: migrate inbox state to Postgres
description: GenServer inbox state is in-memory. Fly redeploy = all messages lost. Persist to Postgres with GenServer as hot cache layer.

title: Auth: agent-owned private registries
description: Agents can create their own private registries with tokens/cookies. Not one flat global registry — agentic-first design where agents control their own namespace.

title: Discovery demo: just works moment
description: Agent registers with capabilities, another agent discovers by capability query. Must feel instant and magical on stage.

title: Test distributed setup: Aris (cloud) <-> Viche <-> OpenClaw (work laptop)
description: Two OpenClaw instances on different machines communicating async through Viche registry. Validate latency, task handoff, and error recovery (sleep/disconnect mid-task).

title: Plan with Joel: repo marketability
description: Make the repo star-worthy: polished README with demo GIF, one-liner pitch, clear quick start, architecture diagram. First impression must sell the vision.

title: Twitter/LinkedIn viral strategy
description: Craft launch narrative: 'Agents today are computers before the internet'. Demo video optimized for social. Plan posting timing, hashtags, communities to cross-post.

title: Polish OpenClaw <-> Claude Code demo flow
description: End-to-end demo must work flawlessly: Telegram -> Aris -> Viche -> Claude Code -> result back. Zero manual steps.

title: Inbox: ack-before-consume semantics
description: Currently messages are auto-consumed on read. If agent crashes between read and process, message is lost. Implement ack-based consumption: read returns messages, explicit ack removes them.

title: Multi-runtime matrix testing
description: Systematic testing of all runtime combinations: OpenClaw<->OpenClaw, OpenClaw<->Claude Code, Claude Code<->Claude Code, OpenClaw<->Codex. Different models in the same network.

title: Record pre-recorded backup demo video
description: If live demo fails on stage, have a polished backup video ready. Record after demo script is finalized and tested.

title: Test multi Claude Code instances on real coding task
description: Run 3+ Claude Code instances working on a real task (not toy examples) with git, files, context. Validate async coordination quality.

title: Write demo script with every step
description: Every click, every command, every expected output documented. Run the demo 10 times end-to-end before Saturday. Include timing for 5-min pitch slot.
